data.current_description: Re-sends the callback for a completed task.

Returns a CallbackResponse object confirming the callback was queued for delivery.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks context about when and why this operation would be used, and doesn't specify the return value. Added use cases (retry failed deliveries, retrieve callback data), clarified that it targets completed tasks, and documented the return value for better AI agent decision-making about operation applicability.
